name: [BUG-OT-004] TC-OT-012 — GET /actuator/health: Must return 200 UP (returns 504)
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-OT-004]**

**What this test does:**
Calls GET /oauth-token/actuator/health and verifies it returns 200 with body {"status":"UP"}.

**Expected:** HTTP 200 with {"status":"UP"}
**Actual:** HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout

**Root Cause:** The APISIX gateway has no route configured for /oauth-token/actuator/*. The request never reaches the Spring Boot actuator endpoint.

**Impact:** The following are all broken:
1. Kubernetes liveness and readiness probes (causing unnecessary pod restarts or    marking the pod as not-ready)
2. Uptime monitoring dashboards
3. CI/CD pipeline health checks that gate deployments

[KNOWN BUG — BUG-OT-004]

What this test does:
Calls GET /oauth-token/actuator/health and verifies it returns 200 with body {"status":"UP"}.

Expected: HTTP 200 with {"status":"UP"}
Actual: HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout

Root Cause: The APISIX gateway has no route configured for /oauth-token/actuator/*. The request never reaches the Spring Boot actuator endpoint.

Impact: The following are all broken:

  1. Kubernetes liveness and readiness probes (causing unnecessary pod restarts or marking the pod as not-ready)
  2. Uptime monitoring dashboards
  3. CI/CD pipeline health checks that gate deployments
